Idioma.MSG_ERROR_La_relacion_debe_volverse_a_ca: ERROR: The relation should calculate again. Process Canceled!
Idioma.MSG_ERROR_La_cuenta_contable_para_Pagos_: ERROR: The accounting account for payments done not carry out is not a valid account. Revise the parameters of the System. Process Canceled.
Idioma.MSG_ERROR_No_se_ha_definido_el_Tipo_de_N: ERROR: The Type of Payroll has not been defined for the Relation of Calculation to Apply
Idioma.MSG_ERROR_La_moneda_del_Tipo_de_Nomina_s: ERROR: The currency of the Type of Payroll only can be the Local Currency of the Business
Idioma.MSG_Se_esta_intentando_aplicar_una_nomin: There's trying to apply a payroll with greater date to the date to
Idioma.MSG_ERROR_El_asiento_Contable_de_la_Nomi: ERROR: The Accounting seat of the Payroll is not Balanced:
Idioma.MSG_ERROR_El_asiento_Contable_de_Otros_C: ERROR: The Accounting seat of Other Costs of the Payroll (not unified) is not Balanced:
